prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The statistics released by the Ministry of Justice relate to the entire UK, including Scotland, and provide essential information about the representation in the Criminal Justice System across all jurisdictions, highlighting trends and issues that are relevant to Scotland as part of the wider UK context.
